# Good robots.txt example

User-agent: *
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /api/
Allow: /api/public/

User-agent: Googlebot
Disallow: /admin/
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Disallow: /admin/
Allow: /

# Sitemap declarations
Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap-posts.xml
